title: stelis chocoensis
intro: Stelis chocoensis is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of South America, particularly in Colombia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis chocoensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Stelis chocoensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
